achievements: First Laparoscopic Surgeon from Amravati District
professional_summary: Dr. Anil Sawarkar, an experienced Infertility and IVF Specialist, leads Sawarkar Infertility TestTube Baby and laparoscopy center. With a decade of experience in laparoscopic surgeries and a strong track record of over 12000 sterilization procedures, Dr. Sawarkar is a pioneer in the field. His clinic, located in Amravati, is renowned for its professionalism, cleanliness, and successful IVF treatments, earning high patient satisfaction rates.
